description: The University of California, Santa Barbara provides campus data and operational APIs for academic, student, dining, housing, employee, and administrative systems through its API developer portal. These APIs are intended for approved campus applications and departments, with different access levels depending on the dataset.
summary: ucsb.edu exposes a developer portal for a REST API gateway at `https://api.ucsb.edu`, with OpenAPI-described APIs that use a UCSB app Consumer Key on every request and, for some endpoints, additional Campus LDAP Basic auth and/or a Google-issued end-user JWT.
